programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after "Jurassic Park," mathematician Ian Malcolm ventures onto a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait. Starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite.

programme.title: The BMF Documentary: Blowing Money Fast
programme.desc: By 2005, law enforcement is closing in on BMF, forcing Terry underground; as the empire collapses, the brothers face life sentences; years later, Terry reflects on their choices, redemption, and the lasting impact of BMF as he begins a new chapter.

Mercer is trying to rebuild his life and his relationship with his son amid the turbulent Los Angeles riots in 1992. Across town, another father and son put their own strained relationship to the test as they plan a risky heist where Mercer works. Starring Tyrese Gibson, Ray Liotta, Scott Eastwood.

programme.title: Never Let Go
programme.desc: When an unspeakable evil takes over the world, the only protection for a mother and her twin sons is their house and strong bond. Needing to stay connected at all times, they tether themselves with ropes, clinging to one another and never letting go. Starring Halle Berry, Anthony B. Jenkins, Percy Daggs.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: An ex-con and reformed sociopath battles a band of heavily armed mercenaries as he tries to uncover the truth behind his brothers mysterious death. Starring Scott Eastwood, Mel Gibson, Tyrese Gibson.

programme.title: Honk for Jesus. Save Your Soul
programme.desc: After a scandal rocks their megachurch, a woman and her husband must rebuild their congregation and reconcile their faith by all means necessary to make the biggest comeback that commodified religion has ever seen. Starring Regina Hall, Sterling K. Brown, Austin Crute.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: A socially awkward teen decides to import a mail-order best friend from France. Instead, he ends up with his personal nightmare: a cologne-soaked, chain-smoking, sex-obsessed youth who quickly becomes the hero of the community. Starring Ed Oxenbould, Avan Jogia, Justin Hartley.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Kate are hijacked by armed thugs while transporting Abnormals. But before the gunmen get what they want, an old Abnormal friend, seeking safe harbor, attaches itself to Kate, endowing her with super powers.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henry travel to the UK to follow up on a werewolf sighting and end up uncovering a dark connection to Henrys past and future.

programme.title: Manufactured Landscapes
programme.desc: The work of photographer Edward Burtynsky includes Chinas ongoing Industrial Revolution.

programme.title: Passport to Paris
programme.desc: Eager to see Paris but tired of their chaperon, identical twins (Ashley Olsen, Mary-Kate Olsen) tour France with two French teenagers. Starring Ashley Olsen, Mary-Kate Olsen, Peter White.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Adopted by the Littles (Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie, Jonathan Lipnicki), a mouse has various adventures which make him appreciate love and family. Starring Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie, Jonathan Lipnicki.

programme.title: Ballerina
programme.desc: A look at the Australian Ballets first aboriginal dancer and her impact on the industry. Featuring interviews, dance sequences, and archive footage that showcases how Ella remains grounded in her own culture while performing.

programme.title: Drink Slay Love
programme.desc: A 16-year old vampire discovers she has the ability to withstand sunlight. Sensing an opportunity to round up new victims, her family enrolls her in high school, where her who-cares attitude quickly makes her the coolest girl around. Starring Cierra Ramirez, Angelique Rivera, Gregg Sulkin.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby
programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing. Starring Clint Eastwood, Hilary Swank, Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: Accidentally separated from his family as a child, Saroo Brierley returns to India 25 years later to find them. Starring Dev Patel, Rooney Mara, David Wenham.

programme.title: Small Things Like These
programme.desc: In 1985 coal merchant Bill Furlong uncovers disturbing secrets in a small Irish town thats controlled by the Roman Catholic Church. Starring Cillian Murphy, Eileen Walsh, Michelle Fairley.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: A young photographer uncovers a dark secret when he meets his girlfriends seemingly friendly parents for the first time at their posh estate. Starring Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Catherine Keener.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Former GFE Bria Jones enters the witness protection program in order to escape an abusive relationship.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria disobeys orders to lay low and meets with a new client.

programme.title: Minx
programme.desc: Joyce and Doug head to Vegas to sell the international rights to Minx; at Bottom Dollar, Tina aims to let loose and host a watch party for the Billie Jean King vs. Bobby Riggs tennis match.

programme.title: Lovesick
programme.desc: Dash, a broke and depressed 33-year-old man, is still in love with his ex, Lauren. It all seems hopeless until he meets Nora, a spontaneous and unforgettable woman. But timing is everything, and Noras not going to wait around. Starring Jay Baruchel, Jessica Pare, Jacob Tierney.

programme.title: Run This Town
programme.desc: A journalist and a political aide become entangled in a larger-than-life scandal. Starring Ben Platt, Mena Massoud, Nina Dobrev.

programme.title: Matthias and Maxime
programme.desc: Two young mens lifelong friendship is tested when they act in a movie whose script calls for them to kiss each other. Starring Gabriel DAlmeida Freitas, Xavier Dolan, Harris Dickinson.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus is trapped inside an abandoned building when she responds to an anonymous call for help; she learns the caller had a very different agenda.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: With Adam Worth under tight security back at the Sanctuary, Magnus discloses the turbulent beginnings he shares with The Five.

programme.title: The Games Maker
programme.desc: Ivans love of board games transports him into the competitive world of game invention. Starring Joseph Fiennes, Tom Cavanagh, Megan Charpentier.

programme.title: To the Arctic
programme.desc: With ice melting in their Arctic environment, a polar bear and her two cubs do what they can to adapt and survive.

programme.title: Blizzard
programme.desc: A youngster learns about true friendship with the help of a magically gifted reindeer from the North Pole. Starring Brenda Blethyn, Christopher Plummer, Kevin Pollak.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Though it is forbidden, a man devises a way to reunite with a long-lost love from the twin world that sits just above his own. Starring Kirsten Dunst, Jim Sturgess, Timothy Spall.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: In order to save his home, an ogre along with a donkey makes a deal with a mean lord to rescue a beautiful princess. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: After returning from their honeymoon and showing home movies to their friends, Shrek and Fiona learn that her parents have heard that she has married her true love and wish to invite him to their kingdom, called Far Far Away. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: When the King falls ill, Shrek finds and trains an heir apparent while Princess Fiona fends off Prince Charmings advances. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: American boy Dre Parkers fighting skills are no match for Cheng, the school bully. He finds a friend in Mr. Han, a maintenance man who is also a martial-arts master. Mr. Han teaches Dre kung fu in the hope that Dre will be able to face down Cheng. Starring Jaden Smith, Jackie Chan, Taraji P. Henson.

In 1946, Branch Rickey (Harrison Ford), general manager of the Brooklyn Dodgers, signs Jackie Robinson (Chadwick Boseman) to the team in defiance of major league baseballs notorious color barrier. Starring Chadwick Boseman, Harrison Ford, Nicole Beharie.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria expands the boundaries of the GFE in order to fulfill her needs.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: With an impending trial date, Ian attempts to rein Bria in by stepping up his surveillance.

programme.title: Minx
programme.desc: Shelly gets a taste of college life while joining Joyce on her victory-lap trip to Vassar; Doug accompanies Tina to her moms retirement party and learns some surprising news; Bambi connects with Richie on a trip of their own.

programme.title: Goon
programme.desc: Though a misfit among his brainy family members, Massachusetts bouncer Doug Glatt has a knockout punch that lands him a spot on a minor-league Canadian hockey team. Starring Seann William Scott, Jay Baruchel, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Goon: Last of the Enforcers
programme.desc: After one too many injuries, hockey player Doug Glatt leaves the game and becomes an insurance salesman at the urging of his pregnant wife. His retirement is short-lived as he laces up the skates once again to try and reclaim his former glory. Starring Seann William Scott, Liev Schreiber, Alison Pill.

programme.title: The Journals of Knud Rasmussen
programme.desc: European explorers change the lives of an Inuit community while exploring the Arctic in 1922. Starring Leah Angutimarik, Natar Ungalaaq, Peter-Henry Arnatsiaq.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Ignoring Magnuss warning, Will accepts Adam Worths offer to show them how to access the hidden city.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and the team gear up for travel, hoping to find the gateway to the hidden city and Magnus father.

programme.title: Miltons Secret
programme.desc: A man (Donald Sutherland) teaches his 11-year-old grandson (William Ainscough) how to cope with bickering parents and the neighborhood bully. Starring Donald Sutherland, Michelle Rodriguez, Mia Kirshner.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: An abandoned boy (Jason James Richter) with a chip on his shoulder befriends an ill-fated killer whale at a water park. Starring Jason James Richter, Lori Petty, Jayne Atkinson.

programme.title: Free Willy 2: The Adventure Home
programme.desc: Whale pal Jesse copes with the existence of a cocky half-brother and the threat of a nearby oil spill. Starring Jason James Richter, August Schellenberg, Michael Madsen.

programme.title: Goose!
programme.desc: A boy (Max Morrow) conspires to save a talking gander from a man (Chevy Chase) who plans to cook the bird in an upcoming culinary contest. Starring Chevy Chase, Kari Matchett, Max Morrow.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: In 1953 a professor (Julia Roberts) of art history challenges her female students (Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles) to re-examine the traditional roles of women. Starring Julia Roberts, Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: We Are Marshall
programme.desc: Jack Lengyel, the new coach at West Virginias Marshall University, vows to rebuild the schools football program after a plane crash claims the lives of 75 players, staff and fans. Starring Matthew McConaughey, Matthew Fox, Ian McShane.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: A black Southern woman (Whoopi Goldberg) struggles to find her identity after suffering years of abuse from her father and others over 40 years. Starring Whoopi Goldberg, Danny Glover, Margaret Avery.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: A former slave (Jamie Foxx) joins forces with the German bounty hunter (Christoph Waltz) who freed him and helps hunt down the Souths most-wanted criminals, all in the hope of finding his long-lost wife (Kerry Washington). Starring Jamie Foxx, Christoph Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria takes matters into her own hands in order to escape Ian.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria must reckon with facing Donald head-on as the day of the trial arrives.

programme.title: Minx
programme.sub-title: God Closes a Door, Opens a Glory Hole
programme.desc: Constance, Joyce, and Tina head to a wilderness retreat to pick Minx International publishers; at Bottom Dollar, Richie has to replace a centerfold and scrambles to redo the new issue.

programme.title: The F Word
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend. Starring Daniel Radcliffe, Zoe Kazan, Megan Park.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: A British POW colonel (Alec Guinness) orders his men to build their Japanese captor (Sessue Hayakawa) a railway bridge in the jungle. Starring William Holden, Alec Guinness, Sessue Hayakawa.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: Flamboyant Gen. George S. Patton (George C. Scott) receives accolades and censure as he fights World War II. Starring George C. Scott, Karl Malden, David Bauer.

programme.title: The Deer Hunter
programme.desc: The horrors of Vietnam affect three Pennsylvania steelworkers (Robert De Niro, Christopher Walken, John Savage), lifelong friends who serve together. Starring Robert De Niro, Christopher Walken, John Savage.

programme.title: Das Boot
programme.desc: The captain (Jurgen Prochnow) and crew of a World War II U-boat follow incredible orders under claustrophobic conditions. Starring Jurgen Prochnow, Herbert Gronemeyer, Klaus Wennemann.

programme.title: They Were Expendable
programme.desc: Heroic PT boat captains (Robert Montgomery, John Wayne) fight Japanese ships in the World War II Philippines. Starring Robert Montgomery, John Wayne, Donna Reed.

programme.title: White Shadows in the South Seas
programme.desc: A doctor (Monte Blue) tries to save an island beauty (Raquel Torres) and her tribe from corruption by a pearl trader (Robert Anderson). Starring Monte Blue, Raquel Torres, Robert Anderson.

programme.title: All the Brothers Were Valiant
programme.desc: Whaling brothers (Robert Taylor, Stewart Granger) sail the 19th-century South Seas, where black pearls and a woman (Ann Blyth) bring mutiny. Starring Robert Taylor, Stewart Granger, Ann Blyth.

programme.title: Gullivers Travels
programme.desc: Animators Max and Dave Fleischers adaptation of Jonathan Swifts classic about a shipwrecked Englishman in Lilliput. Starring Lanny Ross, Pinto Colvig, Jessica Dragonette.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: Daniel Defoes British sailor (Dan OHerlihy) is shipwrecked for 28 years with cannibals, and his man Friday (Jaime Fernández). Starring Dan OHerlihy, Jaime Fernández, Felipe de Alba.

programme.title: Hawaii
programme.desc: A New England missionary (Max von Sydow) and his bride (Julie Andrews) bring Christianity to 1820s Hawaii. Starring Julie Andrews, Max von Sydow, Richard Harris.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: Navy nurse Nellie (Mitzi Gaynor) falls for plantation-owner Emile (Rossano Brazzi), who accepts a top-secret World War II mission. Starring Mitzi Gaynor, Rossano Brazzi, John Kerr.

programme.title: Lassie Come Home
programme.desc: An English boys (Roddy McDowall) collie finds her way back home from Scotland after his father (Donald Crisp) sells her to a duke. Starring Roddy McDowall, Donald Crisp, Dame May Whitty.

programme.title: Come Back, Little Sheba
programme.desc: A housewife (Shirley Booth) and her alcoholic husband (Burt Lancaster) rent a spare room to a pretty student (Terry Moore). Starring Burt Lancaster, Shirley Booth, Terry Moore.

programme.title: The Awful Truth
programme.desc: Spouses (Irene Dunne, Cary Grant) try to spoil each others chances for romance before their divorce becomes final in 90 days. Starring Irene Dunne, Cary Grant, Ralph Bellamy.

programme.title: Umberto D
programme.desc: A lonely old man struggles to maintain his dignity while leading a meager existence with his dog as his only companion. Starring Carlo Battisti, Maria-Pia Casilio, Lina Gennari.

programme.title: Sounder
programme.desc: A sharecroppers (Paul Winfield) wife (Cicely Tyson) keeps the family together after he goes to prison in 1930s Louisiana. Starring Cicely Tyson, Paul Winfield, Kevin Hooks.

programme.title: Disraeli
programme.desc: The prime minister of Great Britain makes a decision to purchase the Suez Canal despite opposing pressures. Starring George Arliss, Joan Bennett, Anthony Bushell.

programme.title: Viva Villa!
programme.desc: Mexican bandit Pancho Villa (Wallace Beery) and his gang join the peasant army in revolution. Starring Wallace Beery, Leo Carrillo, Fay Wray.

programme.title: Rasputin and the Empress
programme.desc: A prince (John Barrymore) plots to kill mad monk Rasputin (Lionel Barrymore) for the good of the czar, the czarina (Ethel Barrymore) and Russia. Starring John Barrymore, Ethel Barrymore, Lionel Barrymore.

programme.title: The Private Life of Henry VIII
programme.desc: Laughton won an Oscar for his portrayal of the 16th-century English monarch in Alexander Kordas biographical account. Starring Charles Laughton, Elsa Lanchester, Binnie Barnes.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: The 18th-century Austrian princess (Norma Shearer) has an affair with a Swedish count (Tyrone Power) and becomes queen of France. Starring Norma Shearer, Tyrone Power, John Barrymore.

programme.title: Julius Caesar
programme.desc: Shakespeares Brutus (James Mason), Cassius (John Gielgud) and others plot the Roman rulers death, but Mark Antony (Marlon Brando) avenges it. Starring Marlon Brando, James Mason, John Gielgud.

programme.title: Sunrise at Campobello
programme.desc: Franklin Delano Roosevelt (Ralph Bellamy) fights polio and enters politics with his wife, Eleanor (Greer Garson). Starring Ralph Bellamy, Greer Garson, Hume Cronyn.

programme.title: Gaslight
programme.desc: A Scotland Yard detective (Joseph Cotten) figures out why a schizoid Victorian (Charles Boyer) is trying to drive his wife (Ingrid Bergman) mad. Starring Charles Boyer, Ingrid Bergman, Joseph Cotten.

programme.title: Imitation of Life
programme.desc: An aspiring actress and her black housekeeper retain a solid friendship despite problems with their teenage daughters. Starring Lana Turner, John Gavin, Sandra Dee.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: A man in black (Yul Brynner) recruits six hired guns to lead Mexican villagers against the gang of an outlaw (Eli Wallach). Starring Yul Brynner, Eli Wallach, Steve McQueen.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: A boozing rock stars (Kris Kristofferson) career falls as fast as his unknown lovers (Barbra Streisand) begins to rise. Starring Barbra Streisand, Kris Kristofferson, Gary Busey.

programme.title: Show Boat
programme.desc: The captains daughter (Kathryn Grayson) marries a gambler (Howard Keel) who turns performer on a Mississippi riverboat. Starring Kathryn Grayson, Howard Keel, Ava Gardner.

programme.title: The Merry Widow
programme.desc: The king of bankrupt Marshovia orders a playboy count (Fernando Lamas) to woo a rich widow (Lana Turner) in Paris. Starring Lana Turner, Fernando Lamas, Una Merkel.

programme.title: Cimarron
programme.desc: Husband-and-wife homesteaders (Glenn Ford, Maria Schell) spend 25 years in Oklahoma after the great land rush of 1889. Starring Glenn Ford, Maria Schell, Anne Baxter.

programme.title: The Sea Hawk
programme.desc: A British privateer (Errol Flynn) raids Spanish ships with his queens (Flora Robson) permission in 1585. Starring Errol Flynn, Brenda Marshall, Flora Robson.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Based on the story by Louisa May Alcott. The four March sisters forge unbreakable emotional ties during the Civil War. Starring June Allyson, Peter Lawford, Elizabeth Taylor.

programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
programme.desc: Gentle Dr. Jekyll (Spencer Tracy) tests a serum on himself, releasing vicious alter-ego Mr. Hyde on 19th-century London. Prowling the town, Hyde ventures to a music hall and encounters Ivy (Ingrid Bergman), whom he takes forcibly as his mistress. Starring Spencer Tracy, Ingrid Bergman, Lana Turner.

programme.title: Waterloo Bridge
programme.desc: A ballet dancer (Vivien Leigh) and a British officer (Robert Taylor) cross stars on the eve of World War I. Starring Vivien Leigh, Robert Taylor, Lucile Watson.

programme.title: Going My Way
programme.desc: Singing Father OMalley (Bing Crosby) bails out crusty Father Fitzgibbons (Barry Fitzgerald) financially strapped parish. Starring Bing Crosby, Barry Fitzgerald, Rise Stevens.

programme.title: Elmer Gantry
programme.desc: An Oscar-winning adaptation of the Sinclair Lewis novel about religious fervor in small-town America. Starring Burt Lancaster, Jean Simmons, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: A Man for All Seasons
programme.desc: Sir Thomas More (Paul Scofield) opposes Henry VIIIs (Robert Shaw) appointing himself head of the Church of England. Starring Paul Scofield, Robert Shaw, Orson Welles.

programme.title: How It Feels to Be Free
programme.desc: African-American female performers changed American culture through their films; fashion; music; politics.

programme.desc: A young couple about to be first-time parents, a trio of house guests who have long overstayed their welcome, and a hitman who maybe stole a car, or maybe didnt.

programme.title: Secrets of Wickensburg
programme.desc: Young Willow discovers her magical heritage and is transported to Wickensburg in the 1600s, where she must stop Mr. Hexenmeister from seizing an ancient artifact.

programme.title: Sometimes I Think About Dying
programme.desc: A lonely and socially awkward woman tries to make a connection with a friendly new co-worker who takes her out on a date. Starring Daisy Ridley, Dave Merheje, Parvesh Cheena.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: The murder of Afrikka Hardy in 2014 turns out to be a catalyst for the investigation that ultimately exposes the crimes committed by Darren Deon Vann.

programme.title: Mom vs. Matchmaker
programme.desc: Bartender Moshe is looking for a short-term romance, his mother has other plans.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: When an affair with a mutual friend turns into a messy divorce and re-marriage, the treachery begins as police try to discover who pulled the trigger on Helium Road.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: A former U.S. Olympic medalist is shot dead in his yard when he goes outside to inspect a mysterious noise, but police discover his murderer was known to him.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: When a mans family and coworkers lose touch with him for days, the police are sent to his apartment; what they find is far worse than any of them expected.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A devoted mother vanishes without a trace; decades later, a backyard excavation unearths the truth, exposing a long-buried crime and a betrayal that shattered a family.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart. Starring Max Eigenmann, Jaeden Boadilla, Leanne Best.

programme.title: Cat Daddies

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Near Gunnison, Colo., Jake Millison goes missing; the outcome seems grim as the months wear on, but a break in the case unravels the mystery behind his disappearance, revealing a greed-fueled plot far more sinister than anyone can imagine.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Dr. Dale Cavaness is revered in his hometown of Eldorado, Ill., but after his 22-year-old son is slain execution-style, authorities find that the good doctor has some skeletons in the closet.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: A motel housekeeper in Oakley, Kan., discovers the body of her co-worker Alice Pepperl; the room lacks hard evidence to point to a suspect, but a special coin taken from the cash register could be all it takes.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When a sophisticated organized crime group orchestrates the theft of rare books from a London warehouse, a determined international team of investigators must unravel the intricate plot before the literary treasures disappear.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: A young woman, her new boyfriend and her single mother embark on a sailing adventure to Bermuda. However, when criminals suddenly attack their boat, the pleasure trip turns into a desperate fight for survival and a quest for vengeance. Starring Odeya Rush, Eric Dane, Saffron Burrows.

programme.title: If I Cant Have You
programme.desc: Disc jockey Michelle Hall attracts the amorous attention of an unknown, demented fan. Meanwhile, back at home, her nosy neighbor seems to watch and know every move she makes. Starring Jackee Harry, Bailey Kai, Gina Hiraizumi.

programme.title: Seduced by His Lies
programme.desc: Terri returns from an extended trip to find a mysterious yet captivating stranger living in her recently purchased home. Believing theyve been scammed, they team up to expose the criminals, only to uncover a chilling labyrinth of lies and deception. Starring Lauren Lee Smith, Christopher Russell.

programme.title: Run (2025)
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: Four Letters of Love (2024)
programme.desc: Nicholas and Isabel are made for each other, but as destiny pulls them together, family, passion and faith drives them apart. As they embark on journeys of heartache and misplaced love, fate soon contrives to pull the threads of their lives together.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffanys (1961)
programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly (Audrey Hepburn) puzzles a writer (George Peppard) who lives in her building.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: While in jail for murdering her husband (Bruce Greenwood), a woman (Ashley Judd) discovers he is living under a new identity with their son.

programme.title: Regarding Us (2025)
programme.desc: After losing her teaching career, A transgender woman has a profound impact on the lives of two children.

programme.title: Last Weekend (2014)
programme.desc: Petty squabbling marks the Memorial Day reunion of an affluent matriarch (Patricia Clarkson) and her dysfunctional family (Chris Mulkey, Zachary Booth).

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: The Hours (2002)
programme.desc: The writings of Virginia Woolf (Nicole Kidman) affect a housewife (Julianne Moore) and emulate the life of a New Yorker (Meryl Streep) who is in love with a dying poet.

programme.title: Losing Isaiah (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-crack addict (Halle Berry) fights for custody of her son adopted by a social worker (Jessica Lange) and her husband (David Strathairn).
